answer: Embrace the unexpected turns in your journey, as they often lead to the most fulfilling experiences. Life can be like a coiled rope; it twists and turns in ways you might not anticipate. By allowing yourself to be flexible, you can navigate through life's challenges with greater ease and discover hidden treasures along the way. When you learn to bounce back from setbacks, you'll find that resilience becomes a superpower, helping you to thrive even in the midst of chaos. Remember, the path less traveled might just be the one that leads to your greatest growth
